labs  ","details":"Supports order book-style trading with customizable fee models.       Integrates with Core.sol for asset locking and settlements, and Staking.sol for validator rewards.","errors":{"InvalidServiceSignature()":[{"details":"Thrown when signature validation fails"}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"cancelOrder(address,(uint256,address,address,address,uint256,bytes),uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Validates ownership, refunds tokenA, deletes order Cancellation Flow: 1. Validates signature via State.sol 2. Validates user is order owner 3. Processes optional priority fee 4. Refunds locked tokenA to user 5. Deletes order (sets seller to address(0)) 6. Rewards staker if applicable State.sol Integration: - Validates signature with State.validateAndConsumeNonce - Uses async nonce (isAsyncExec = true) - Hash includes tokenA, tokenB, orderId - Prevents replay attacks and double cancellation Core.sol Integration: - Refunds tokenA via makeCaPay (order.amountA) - Priority fee via requestPay (if > 0) - Staker reward: 2-3x MATE via _rewardExecutor - makeCaPay handles staker priority fee distribution Security: - Only order owner can cancel - Atomic refund + deletion - Market slot becomes available for reuse","params":{"metadata":"Cancel details (tokens, orderId, nonce)","noncePay":"Nonce for EVVM payment transaction","priorityFeePay":"Optional priority fee for staker","signaturePay":"Signature for EVVM payment","user":"Address that owns the order"}},"dispatchOrder_fillFixedFee(address,(uint256,address,address,address,uint256,uint256,bytes),uint256,uint256,bytes,uint256)":{"details":"Fee = min(proportionalFee, maxLimitFillFixedFee) with -10% tolerance Fixed Fee Execution Flow: 1. Validates signature via State.sol 2. Validates market and order exist 3. Calculates capped fee and 10% tolerance 4. Validates amountOfTokenBToFill >= amountB + fee - 10% 5. Collects tokenB + amount via Evvm.requestPay 6. Calculates final fee based on actual payment 7. Handles overpayment refund if any 8. Distributes payments (seller, service, staker) 9. Transfers tokenA to buyer via Evvm.makeCaPay 10. Rewards staker (4-5x MATE) 11. Deletes order State.sol Integration: - Validates signature with State.validateAndConsumeNonce - Uses async nonce (isAsyncExec = true) - Hash includes tokenA, tokenB, orderId - Prevents double filling Core.sol Integration: - Collects tokenB via requestPay (variable amount) - Distributes via makeDisperseCaPay:   * Seller: amountB + (finalFee * seller%)   * Staker: priorityFee + (finalFee * staker%)   * Service: finalFee * service% (accumulated) - Transfers tokenA to buyer via makeCaPay - Staker reward: 4-5x MATE via _rewardExecutor Fee Calculation: - Base: amountB (order requirement) - ProportionalFee: (amountB * percentageFee) / 10,000 - Fee: min(proportionalFee, maxLimitFillFixedFee) - Tolerance: fee * 10% (fee10) - MinRequired: amountB + fee - fee10 - FullRequired: amountB + fee - FinalFee: Based on actual payment amount Tolerance Range: - Accepts payment between [amountB + 90% fee] and   [amountB + 100% fee] - Calculates actual fee from payment received - Enables flexible fee payment for users","params":{"maxFillFixedFee":"Max fee cap (for testing)","metadata":"Dispatch details (tokens, orderId, amount)","noncePay":"Nonce for EVVM payment transaction","priorityFeePay":"Optional priority fee for staker","signaturePay":"Signature for EVVM payment","user":"Address filling the order (buyer)"}},"dispatchOrder_fillPropotionalFee(address,(uint256,address,address,address,uint256,uint256,bytes),uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Fee = amountB * percentageFee / 10,000 Proportional Fee Execution Flow: 1. Validates signature via State.sol 2. Validates market and order exist 3. Calculates fee: (amountB * percentageFee) / 10,000 4. Validates amountOfTokenBToFill >= amountB + fee 5. Collects tokenB + fee via Evvm.requestPay 6. Handles overpayment refund if any 7. Distributes payments (seller, service, staker) 8. Transfers tokenA to buyer via Evvm.makeCaPay 9. Rewards staker (4-5x MATE) 10. Deletes order State.sol Integration: - Validates signature with State.validateAndConsumeNonce - Uses async nonce (isAsyncExec = true) - Hash includes tokenA, tokenB, orderId - Prevents double filling Core.sol Integration: - Collects tokenB via requestPay (amountB + fee) - Distributes via makeDisperseCaPay:   * Seller: amountB + (fee * seller%)   * Staker: priorityFee + (fee * staker%)   * Service: fee * service% (accumulated) - Transfers tokenA to buyer via makeCaPay - Staker reward: 4-5x MATE via _rewardExecutor Fee Calculation: - Base: amountB (order requirement) - Fee: (amountB * percentageFee) / 10,000 - Total: amountB + fee - Example: 5% fee = 500 / 10,000","params":{"metadata":"Dispatch details (tokens, orderId, amount)","noncePay":"Nonce for EVVM payment transaction","priorityFeePay":"Optional priority fee for staker","signaturePay":"Signature for EVVM payment","user":"Address filling the order (buyer)"}},"getIfUsedAsyncNonce(address,uint256)":{"details":"View function returning core.getIfUsedAsyncNonce(user, nonce). Reserved nonces return false until consumed.","params":{"nonce":"Async nonce to check","user":"User address to query"},"returns":{"_0":"true if consumed, false if available/reserved"}},"getNextCurrentSyncNonce(address)":{"details":"View function returning core.getNextCurrentSyncNonce(user). Auto-increments after each use.","params":{"user":"User address to query"},"returns":{"_0":"Next sync nonce for user"}},"makeOrder(address,(uint256,address,address,address,uint256,uint256),bytes,uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Locks tokenA in Core.sol and opens an order slot.      Markets are automatically created for new token pairs.","params":{"metadata":"Order details (tokens, amounts, nonce).","noncePay":"Nonce for the Core payment (locks tokenA).","priorityFeePay":"Optional priority fee for the executor.","signature":"Seller's authorization signature.","signaturePay":"Signature for the Core payment.","user":"Seller address."},"returns":{"market":"The ID of the market.","orderId":"The ID of the order within that market."}},"reserveAsyncNonceToService(uint256)":{"details":"Calls core.reserveAsyncNonce(user, nonce, address(this)). Nonce can be revoked before use.","params":{"nonce":"Async nonce number to reserve"}},"revokeAsyncNonceToService(address,uint256)":{"details":"Calls core.revokeAsyncNonce(user, nonce). Cannot revoke consumed nonces.","params":{"nonce":"Async nonce number to revoke","user":"User address that reserved nonce"}}},"title":"EVVM P2P Swap","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"cancelOrder(address,(uint256,address,address,address,uint256,bytes),uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Cancels existing order and refunds locked tokens"},"dispatchOrder_fillFixedFee(address,(uint256,address,address,address,uint256,uint256,bytes),uint256,uint256,bytes,uint256)":{"notice":"Fills order using fixed/capped fee model"},"dispatchOrder_fillPropotionalFee(address,(uint256,address,address,address,uint256,uint256,bytes),uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Fills order using proportional fee model"},"getIfUsedAsyncNonce(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Checks if async nonce was consumed"},"getNextCurrentSyncNonce(address)":{"notice":"Gets next sequential sync nonce for cancelOrder(address,(uint256,address,add.details: Validates ownership, refunds tokenA, deletes order Cancellation Flow: 1. Validates signature via State.sol 2. Validates user is order owner 3. Processes optional priority fee 4. Refunds locked tokenA to user 5. Deletes order (sets seller to address(0)) 6. Rewards staker if applicable State.sol Integration: - Validates signature with State.validateAndConsumeNonce - Uses async nonce (isAsyncExec = true) - Hash includes tokenA, tokenB, orderId - Prevents replay attacks and double cancellation Core.sol Integration: - Refunds tokenA via makeCaPay (order.amountA) - Priority fee via requestPay (if > 0) - Staker reward: 2-3x MATE via _rewardExecutor - makeCaPay handles staker priority fee distribution Security: - Only order owner can cancel - Atomic refund + deletion - Market slot becomes available for reuse

dispatchOrder_fillFixedFee(address,(uint.details: Fee = min(proportionalFee, maxLimitFillFixedFee) with -10% tolerance Fixed Fee Execution Flow: 1. Validates signature via State.sol 2. Validates market and order exist 3. Calculates capped fee and 10% tolerance 4. Validates amountOfTokenBToFill >= amountB + fee - 10% 5. Collects tokenB + amount via Evvm.requestPay 6. Calculates final fee based on actual payment 7. Handles overpayment refund if any 8. Distributes payments (seller, service, staker) 9. Transfers tokenA to buyer via Evvm.makeCaPay 10. Rewards staker (4-5x MATE) 11. Deletes order State.sol Integration: - Validates signature with State.validateAndConsumeNonce - Uses async nonce (isAsyncExec = true) - Hash includes tokenA, tokenB, orderId - Prevents double filling Core.sol Integration: - Collects tokenB via requestPay (variable amount) - Distributes via makeDisperseCaPay:   * Seller: amountB + (finalFee * seller%)   * Staker: priorityFee + (finalFee * staker%)   * Service: finalFee * service% (accumulated) - Transfers tokenA to buyer via makeCaPay - Staker reward: 4-5x MATE via _rewardExecutor Fee Calculation: - Base: amountB (order requirement) - ProportionalFee: (amountB * percentageFee) / 10,000 - Fee: min(proportionalFee, maxLimitFillFixedFee) - Tolerance: fee * 10% (fee10) - MinRequired: amountB + fee - fee10 - FullRequired: amountB + fee - FinalFee: Based on actual payment amount Tolerance Range: - Accepts payment between [amountB + 90% fee] and   [amountB + 100% fee] - Calculates actual fee from payment received - Enables flexible fee payment for users

dispatchOrder_fillPropotionalFee(address.details: Fee = amountB * percentageFee / 10,000 Proportional Fee Execution Flow: 1. Validates signature via State.sol 2. Validates market and order exist 3. Calculates fee: (amountB * percentageFee) / 10,000 4. Validates amountOfTokenBToFill >= amountB + fee 5. Collects tokenB + fee via Evvm.requestPay 6. Handles overpayment refund if any 7. Distributes payments (seller, service, staker) 8. Transfers tokenA to buyer via Evvm.makeCaPay 9. Rewards staker (4-5x MATE) 10. Deletes order State.sol Integration: - Validates signature with State.validateAndConsumeNonce - Uses async nonce (isAsyncExec = true) - Hash includes tokenA, tokenB, orderId - Prevents double filling Core.sol Integration: - Collects tokenB via requestPay (amountB + fee) - Distributes via makeDisperseCaPay:   * Seller: amountB + (fee * seller%)   * Staker: priorityFee + (fee * staker%)   * Service: fee * service% (accumulated) - Transfers tokenA to buyer via makeCaPay - Staker reward: 4-5x MATE via _rewardExecutor Fee Calculation: - Base: amountB (order requirement) - Fee: (amountB * percentageFee) / 10,000 - Total: amountB + fee - Example: 5% fee = 500 / 10,000

getIfUsedAsyncNonce(address,uint256).details: View function returning core.getIfUsedAsyncNonce(user, nonce). Reserved nonces return false until consumed.

returns._0: true if consumed, false if available/reserved

getNextCurrentSyncNonce(address).details: View function returning core.getNextCurrentSyncNonce(user). Auto-increments after each use.

makeOrder(address,(uint256,address,addre.details: Locks tokenA in Core.sol and opens an order slot.      Markets are automatically created for new token pairs.

params.noncePay: Nonce for the Core payment (locks tokenA).
params.priorityFeePay: Optional priority fee for the executor.

returns.orderId: The ID of the order within that market.

reserveAsyncNonceToService(uint256).details: Calls core.reserveAsyncNonce(user, nonce, address(this)). Nonce can be revoked before use.

revokeAsyncNonceToService(address,uint25.details: Calls core.revokeAsyncNonce(user, nonce). Cannot revoke consumed nonces.

cancelOrder(address,(uint256,address,add.notice: Cancels existing order and refunds locked tokens

dispatchOrder_fillFixedFee(address,(uint.notice: Fills order using fixed/capped fee model

dispatchOrder_fillPropotionalFee(address.notice: Fills order using proportional fee model

getIfUsedAsyncNonce(address,uint256).notice: Checks if async nonce was consumed

getNextCurrentSyncNonce(address).notice: Gets next sequential sync nonce for user

makeOrder(address,(uint256,address,addre.notice: Creates a new limit order in a specific trading market.

reserveAsyncNonceToService(uint256).notice: Reserves async nonce for user and this service exclusively

revokeAsyncNonceToService(address,uint25.notice: Revokes reserved async nonce before use
